title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of this photo?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We never approved it!! And I thought we told you to remove the "D."!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The photo was sent in by CPO's Guernica- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Repaint it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world cannot be permitted to see this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been trying to contact the printers, but I'm afraid it's no use....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then cease distribution immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kowahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a mystifying appearance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, people! It's up to us to spread this around the globe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gipher Pol's transmission from Wano broke off right after they spotted big mom's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gears of the world won't stop turning! I won't let their propaganda slide when the real story is this thrilling!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like a live show! I can't get enough!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the Bombshell news of the defeat of the emperors,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Big Mom and Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...spread very rapidly around the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The three captains respond- Bible for ending their decades of Dominion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...were all issued an extraordinary bounty by the government!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Monkey D. Luffy, Eustass "Captain" kid, and Trafalgar Law are now worth 3 billion Berry a piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: UDon, Wano

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 3 Billiom?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Captain, that's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, where did that OAF, kid, run off to?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had a funny look in his eye.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Gotta be to the flower capital...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FAFAFA, it's kid we're talking about. There's only one thing on his mind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's follow him, I heard there's a festival today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Perfect!! Let's celebrate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Looks like things are getting complicated...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We shall start with a course of cloud ear mushroom and crown daisy soup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then a plate of gisei tofu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...followed by a bowl of lotus roots.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We also have small sunomono dishes as a side...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yes, do not forget the tall bowl....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything must be impeccable, these are not your run-of-the-mill patrons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure everything is mashed and boiled properly, and triple check for poison!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now then, time to serve!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I put everything I have into this menu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is truly a full course meal fit for a SHOGUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please enjoy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahahaha, it looks delicious!! Thank you for all your effort!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid the others couldn't wait the full two hours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the sounds of it, they're really going to town out there, aren't they?

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
